refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refinement breaks it down into actionable sub-functions that address key productivity drivers: equipment operation efficiency and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual productivity (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and compare against the customer-defined target; verify sub-functions by monitoring equipment utilization and task completion rates.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize effective working time.
FR2: Optimize task execution to minimize idle and transition times.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive equipment control algorithms to maximize operational efficiency.
DP2: Implement dynamic task scheduling and routing to minimize idle and transition times.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both equipment operation and task execution optimization.

potential_sources: Interaction between equipment control and task scheduling algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically coupled but can be modularized with well-defined interfaces to minimize complexity.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of real-time telemetry data for adaptive control.
Risk that task scheduling may conflict with equipment control priorities.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor coupling during implementation and consider interface refinement if integration complexity increases.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level coordination of productivity optimization including equipment control and task scheduling.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time equipment and environment data for adaptive control and scheduling.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Exchanges task assignments and status updates with external task management systems.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE solution and vehicle or teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as productivity optimization is a core system function; low diffusion risk due to centralized control.
Vehicle module implements physical control but less suitable for overall productivity logic containment.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control, not productivity optimization logic.
Safety Services unrelated to productivity optimization.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing productivity optimization logic in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if too many functions are centralized.
Interface dependencies with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules may increase integration effort.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution to manage complexity; define clear interface contracts.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by selected DPs that logically address the sub-functions with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing productivity logic in NGHE Solution reduces diffusion risk but requires careful interface management.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate for the productivity optimization DPs.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring productivity KPIs and validating interface data flows.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of productivity optimization to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation modules to reduce integration complexity.
Plan for modularization within NGHE Solution to handle complexity growth.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize effective working time.
FR2: Optimize task execution to minimize idle and transition times.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Real-time telemetry data is available and reliable.
open_risks: Integration complexity between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation modules.
Potential conflicts between equipment control and task scheduling priorities.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype implementations of adaptive control and task scheduling.
Interface validation tests between NGHE Solution and other modules.
